Headline: #71 71st/South Shore Temporary Northbound Reroute near 73rd/Exchange
ShortDescription: Northbound  71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted via 75th, Exchange and 71st: due to, street blockage near 73rd/Exchange.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound  #71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted via 75th, Exchange and 71st: due to, street blockage near 73rd/Exchange.

Southbound  buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #84 Peterson Temporary Reroute near Bryn Mawr/Sheridan
ShortDescription: 84 Peterson buses temp. rerouted: due to, police activity near Bryn Mawr/Sheridan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#84 Peterson buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near due to police activity near Bryn Mawr/Sheridan.

Eastbound buses will operate via Ridge and Broadway  including the normal route streets.

Westbound buses will operate via Broadway, Hollywood and Ridge.

Allow extra travel time.
